title: doryopteris ludens
intro: Doryopteris ludens, also known as the ladder fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Doryopteris ludens include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic and a digestive aid. In herbal preparations, Doryopteris ludens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
